name: mspec
description: A minimalist Spec-Driven Development (SDD) toolkit for solo developers and AI agents

scripts.build: tsc && mkdir -p dist/templates/prompts dist/templates/agents && cp src/templates/prompts/*.md dist/templates/prompts/ && cp src/templates/agents/*.yaml dist/templates/agents/ && node dist/transform-agents.js dist/templates/agents dist/agents

author: rzkmak
